hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -q 'guides\.md$' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"guides.md is auto-generated by tests. Never edit it manually."}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qiE '(TEST_AZ_TABLE_STORAGE_CONNECTION|TEST_AZ_COSMOSDB_CONNECTION|TEST_SFDC_CONNECTION)' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"SECURITY: Never log, echo, or expose TEST_*_CONNECTION env vars."}' || true
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && npm run validate || true
